title: Handmade Eco Soy Candle, 160g, 30 Hours Burn Time, Italian Glass Container (Goddess)
features: Sustainable: Handcrafted in Scotland using eco-friendly soy wax with an elegant Italian glass container.
Long-Lasting: Provides up to 30 hours of gentle, fragrant illumination.
Thoughtful Gift: Beautifully packaged, making it an ideal present for loved ones.
Unique Aroma: Carefully curated scent offers a delightful sensory experience.
description: Product Description Hand poured, Highly Scented Candles Made in Scotland Each of our candles is hand poured in Scotland, we take care over every candle we produce to ensure our high standards are always maintained. Our Candles Our candles are lovingly made in Scotland. They are made with 100% natural soy wax, each scented with a carefully selected blend of fragrance oils. - Our Signature Collection features scents made for by Bay Interiors by a UK leading perfumery. We have chosen specific scents close to our hearts to create a collection of completely unique home fragrance products. Our Signature Collection scents are not available anywhere else other than directly from us! - As with all candles, please remember to trim your wicks to 4-6mm prior to every burn. All candles must be discontinued once there is 1cm of wax left at the bottom for health and safety. - Signature Collection Cosy Embers Warm, comforting, like a hug in a candle! A rich woody fragrance dominated by earthy patchouli supported with notes of precious agarwood, cedar, vetiver, amber and musk. Signature Collection Spa Day A day of relaxation awaits! A citrus floral accord opening with reviving lemon, lime, lemongrass, and aromatic basil followed by a heart of geranium supported by a hint of peppermint and lavender resting on a warm base of spiced woods. Lime, Basil & Mandarin Our version of the popular bath & body brand. Notes of peppery basil and aromatic white thyme which brings an unexpected twist to the scent of limes on a Caribbean breeze. A modern classic. Rhubarb & Rose Our version of the popular bath & body brand. A crisp mouth-watering rhubarb fragrance smoothed by elderflower, tea rose and hints of pineapple resting on a base of musk, velvety woods and dry fruits. Goddess Inspired by the goddess of the night! Enter a dreamy garden, full of floral and fruity aromas, its fragrance as enchanting as the shimmering moonlight. Spell-binding arrangements of delicate florals, refreshing citrus and seductive woods warmed by amber will envelop you in a warm embrace. You'll feel as if you are dancing under the starry sky, the mystical moon watching over you. Coconut Lemongrass A creamy tropical blend of coconuts and zesty lime followed by lemongrass and warming ginger supported by a vanilla base. Vanilla, Cocoa & Nutmeg An indulgently sweet blend of coconut cream, vanilla milk, creamy caramel and sugar. Followed by the complex scents of nutmeg, black hazelnut and roasted coffee. Range Our range of candles has been specially chosen from our best selling wax melts! Bringing the very best of home fragrance to you. Ingredients 90% Soy Wax 10% Fragrance Oil Wick Our wicks are coreless, cotton flat braid wick with paper filament throughout, providing increased rigidity and strength. Their self-trimming and clean burning characteristics minimize mushrooming, soot, and smoke. Contents Each candle comes in a beautiful box with liner. Up to 30 hours burn time 160g Volume
